{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232036421E16078C767E49A44D0D"}"},"total":13204},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7294140749801112371","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然是系统文，但是系统的痕迹并不突出，现在几乎没有一本书可以让我完整的看完！但这部小说，才是真正的让人引人入胜的，毫无违背逻辑和常理的的，看着舒服的好小说！关注了，难得的好文！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1698300732,"group_id":"7278791977582201890","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5o579tI6HOMXOg17GBhvqw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/45ed635f25c44ef987ab9dba16cae793~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792731&x-signature=5uW%2B4eADfmtA%2FMdGmqqgjr6u4rE%3D","user_id":"109632497294","user_name":"浪荡灬帝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109632497294","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1649081801,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7278791977582201890","book_info":{"abstract":"林绍文在同学聚会上喝醉了，睡一觉醒来，莫名其妙的来到了情满四合院的世界，成为了北京中医学院的优异毕业生林绍文。
他现在刚刚大学毕业，现在面临着选择，是去协和医院当一名前途无量的正式医生，还是去轧钢厂当一名默默无闻的厂医。
林绍文二话不说，就选择了厂医。
没有办法，让一个社畜去医院当医生，那不等于是杀人？更何况，协和医院可都是大佬级别的，人家一眼就能看出他的医学水平。
可在他做出了选择后，脑海中“叮”了一声。
“诸天垂钓”系统开启，诸天万物，皆可垂钓。
林绍文差点没吐血，这该死的垂钓系统早来一分钟，他的人生就不一样了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07ec1afca7f8dbec48de65ec026c26a8","author":"他日我若为青帝","author_id":"","book_id":"7278791977582201890","book_name":"四合院：做一个有素养的流氓","book_short_name":"训禽记","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"28.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":495,"name":"四合院","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=495&name=四合院&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7278792632317248035","read_count":"280123","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"5873330"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"2770","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,诸天万界,四合院,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1645685f83e583d68348daa30cbfded8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779453402&x-signature=IlPQVatpsreS3jnwMq6WD45tnm8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3896286326568440","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.0417256e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232036421E16078C767E4 9A44D0D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":350,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18418,"reply_count":61,"show_pv":251241},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7308129168503735092","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"满分，后面别中途跑了开新书"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701562370,"group_id":"7278791977582201890","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102049222854"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7278791977582201890","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.0050135e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":30049,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7286150979107881740","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"轻松欢快，也不是训禽文，也没有过分深扒每个剧情人物的性格特征和时间背景，就主打一个将心比心，你好我好，我好你好。作为年轻人，有事想做就做，有话该说就说，也不婆婆妈妈。故事线可以做参考，不能沿着用，可以因此有顾虑，但不能因为后面事情的顾虑而影响当下的判断和选择。个人觉得这样就挺好，看的也舒服，当然，前提是别较真。而且一事一了，报完就过，也没说记仇，想再报复，也很简单嘛，让其他人多找事咯，干嘛非要主角自己记仇，浪费精力，这点我觉得作者大大处理安排的很不错。还有一点，医生方面的剧情处理很好，职业的严肃性还是要的，一是一，二是二。
上面给其他读者铁子们做个参考，下面给作者大大一些我个人的看法，作者有时间瞅两眼就好，不一定有用。在我个人看来，一般看这类文的，大多以舒服为主，可能是放松心情，打发时间之类。如果作者思路明确的话，那按自己想法继续走就好，作者你怎么写怎么设定我们就怎么看，大方向自己把握，一些小的方面听听大伙们的意见也挺好，只要看的舒服。
四星不是五星，是因为我觉得这本书后面成绩应该会蛮不错的，先手奶一波，插个眼，怕你骄傲，影响写作心情，后面没出问题我一定补给你，嘿嘿嘿！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696442980,"group_id":"7278791977582201890","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"主职摆烂，写作随缘！！！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/U/tEGgGqeXBrLISzB8ACU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"102049222854","user_name":"林陌悉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102049222854","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7278791977582201890","book_info":{"abstract":"林绍文在同学聚会上喝醉了，睡一觉醒来，莫名其妙的来到了情满四合院的世界，成为了北京中医学院的优异毕业生林绍文。
